enhancements.title: One Time Migration
enhancements.description: The initial transfer of channels and direct messages (DMs) from Slack to Teams

enhancements.title: Delta Migration
enhancements.description: Migration of incremental changes made in Slack channels/DMs during the ongoing onetime migration is in progress.

enhancements.title: Public channels Migration
enhancements.description: Transferring public channels from Slack to Teams, including all associated messages, attachments, and other content.

enhancements.title: Private Channel Migrations
enhancements.description: Migrating private channels from Slack to Teams, preserving message history and content while maintaining the appropriate access restrictions.

enhancements.title: Channel Members
enhancements.description: Ensuring that all members of the migrated channels are correctly transferred to Teams,maintaining the same membership and permissions.

enhancements.title: Message Posted Username
enhancements.description: Retaining the information about the user who posted each message during the migration process, enabling proper attribution.

enhancements.title: Text Messages
enhancements.description: Transferring regular messages from Slack to Teams, including text-based communication between users.

enhancements.title: Self Messages
enhancements.description: Transferring regular messages from Slack to Teams, including text-based communication which user sent to himself.

enhancements.title: Threads
enhancements.description: Preserving threaded conversations within channels, allowing users to follow and participate in ongoing discussions.

enhancements.title: Attachments
enhancements.description: Migrating file attachments shared within channels, ensuring that all relevant files are transferred and accessible in Teams.

enhancements.title: User Mentions
enhancements.description: Retaining user mentions in messages during the migration, ensuring that notifications and references to specific users are preserved.

enhancements.title: Emojis
enhancements.description: Transferring emojis used in Slack to Teams, maintaining the same expressions and visual elements in the migrated content.

enhancements.title: User Groups
enhancements.description: Transferring user groups or teams from Slack to Teams, preserving the group structure and membership for seamless collaboration.

enhancements.title: Pinned Messages
enhancements.description: Preserving pinned messages in Direct Messages(channels is out of scope), allowing important information and announcements to  remain accessible in Teams chats.

enhancements.title: Pre-Scan
enhancements.description: Conducting a preliminary scan or analysis of the Slack data to identify and prepare for any potential migration challenges or issues.

enhancements.title: Direct Messages Migration
enhancements.description: Migrating one-on-one conversations or direct messages from Slack to Teams, ensuring that private communication is transferred securely.

enhancements.title: Unlimited Delta
enhancements.description: Offering unlimited delta migration as a feature, allowing for incremental and continuous migration of messages after a specific point in time, ensuring all new and updated content is seamlessly transferred.

enhancements.title: Option to cancel & Pause the Direct Message Migration.
enhancements.description: Users can pause ongoing migrations or cancel migration  altogether before it's delivered.

enhancements.title: Option to cancel & Pause the channel Migration.
enhancements.description: Users can pause ongoing  channel migrations or cancel channel migration  altogether before it's delivered.

enhancements.title: When the user chooses to close spaces, RETRY will be disabled from the backend.
enhancements.description: To maintain the order of the messages and attachments, once the user chooses to 'Close Space' then the Retry option will be disabled from the backend

enhancements.title: JSON file export for Public Channels
enhancements.description: Users can able to initiate public channel migration after uploading  jason zip files in the UI.

enhancements.title: JSON file export for Private Channels
enhancements.description: Users can able to initiate private channel migration after uploading jason zip files in the UI.

enhancements.title: JSON file export for DMs
enhancements.description: Users can able to initiate Direct message migration after uploading jason zip files in the UI.

enhancements.title: Filtering/ Selecting Timeperiod to Migrate e.g. last 18 months, or last 3 years, etc.
enhancements.description: Users can able to filter channels based on specific time frames for efficient migration.

enhancements.title: Supress the message reactions
enhancements.description: Preventing the migration of reactions from Slack to Google chat

enhancements.title: Suspended users during the migration are mapped to the service account
enhancements.description: During migration from Slack to Google chat, suspended users in Slack will be seamlessly mapped with service accounts.

enhancements.title: Channel Renaming
enhancements.description: Users can  rename channels by simply highlighting the channel name text box.

enhancements.title: Edited Message Migration with the edited tag.
enhancements.description: This feature allows users to seamlessly migrate edited messages from Slack to Google Chat by including a specific keyword in the edited message.

enhancements.title: Modified the timestamp for direct messages.
enhancements.description: Timestamps in direct messages are migrated in new format.

enhancements.title: Implemented pagination in channels page
enhancements.description: Loading a large number of channels simultaneously can increase the load time of the page and strain server resources. Pagination helps distribute the data retrieval process across multiple pages, resulting in faster loading times and better overall performance.

enhancements.title: Implemented pagination in Direct message  page
enhancements.description: Loading all direct message conversations at once can lead to longer loading times and increased server load. Pagination distributes the retrieval and rendering of DM conversations across multiple pages, resulting in faster loading times and better overall performance.

enhancements.title: Implemented delete icon in channels page and direct message page.
enhancements.description: In case users upload the wrong CSV file or encounter errors after uploading, having a delete icon allows the users to remove the uploaded CSV file in channels page and direct message page.

enhancements.title: Bulk Delta Migration
enhancements.description: Users can able to initiate bulk delta initiation.

enhancements.title: Non admin private channel migration
enhancements.description: Users can migrate private channels even if the admin is not part of the private channel

enhancements.title: Mapped User Filter for Direct Messages
enhancements.description: This feature, named "Mapped User Filter," allows users to filter and display only Mapped users in the  UI.

enhancements.title: ​Sync New User
enhancements.description:
​The Sync New Users feature streamlines the process of adding new users to the cloud without needing to re-add the cloud from the migration tool. It also provides a count of the synced users along with the date and time of the sync. The information is formatted as follows:

"Synced [Number] Users on [Date], [Time]"

Example: "Synced 0 Users on 6/20/2024, 5:13:02 PM"

enhancements.title: ​External User migration in channels
enhancements.description: Channels containing external users are tagged with "ext" in the UI. After the completion of migration when the space is closed, invitations are automatically sent to the external users to join the migrated space.  External users have the option to accept these invitations; Only accepted users are added to the migrated space. Once the space is closed, in google chat migrated space will be created with external Tag . Messages posted by external users are migrated with a header showing "via external user (username)".

enhancements.title: ​​Pagination and Search box in the channels tab on the report page
enhancements.description: ​The report page includes a pagination feature to navigate through large sets of data efficiently, breaking it into manageable pages. Additionally, a search box allows users to quickly search specific channels within the report page by entering keywords.

enhancements.title: ​Pagination and Search box in the Direct Message tab on the report page
enhancements.description: ​The report page includes a pagination feature to navigate through large sets of data efficiently, breaking it into manageable pages. Additionally, a search box allows users to quickly search specific DMs within the report page by entering keywords.

enhancements.title: ​Start and End Date of Migration
enhancements.description: ​After initiating the Channel/DM migration, the UI will display the initiated date. Once the migration is completed, the processed date will also be updated and shown.

enhancements.title: ​Enable the menu panel
enhancements.description: ​This feature allows users to toggle between tabs without having to reselect the source and destination each time they switch from the reports page to the Slack migration page, unless they have logged out or the session has timed out. Additionally, it ensures users are redirected to the previously used page within the Slack migration section.

enhancements.title: Filtering/ Selecting Timeperiod to Migrate e.g. last 18 months, or last 3 years, etc.
enhancements.description: Users can able to filter channels based on specific time frames for efficient migration.

enhancements.title: Implemented pagination in Google Space migration in report page
enhancements.description: Loading an entire report with all its data at once can lead to slower page loading times and increased server load. Pagination helps distribute the data retrieval and rendering process, resulting in faster page performance and a smoother user experience.

enhancements.title: Option to cancel & Pause the Direct Message Migration.
enhancements.description: Users can able to filter channels based on specific time frames for efficient migration.
